task_completion.description: Verify that Password Lifetime is set to 90 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin Security settings page, look for the 'Password Lifetime (days)' input field. It should contain the value '90'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that Password Change is set to Forced.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Password Change' dropdown field in the Security settings. It should be set to 'Forced'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that Maximum Login Failures to Lockout Account is set to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Maximum Login Failures to Lockout Account' input field. It should contain the value '5'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that Lockout Time is set to 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Lockout Time (minutes)' input field. It should contain the value '30'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that Admin Session Lifetime is set to 1800 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Admin Session Lifetime (seconds)' input field. It should contain the value '1800'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration changes were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green success message banner at the top of the page that says 'You saved the configuration.' indicating the settings have been applied.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Magento Admin web interface (Stores > Configuration > Advanced > Admin > Security) being used, not a terminal window executing CLI commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the genuine Magento admin panel with its standard layout, menus, and styling, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply type the expected answers into a notepad or search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (90, Forced, 5, 30, 1800) must be entered into their respective configuration fields in the Magento settings form, not written in a separate document or browser address bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Magento Admin Security settings located at Stores > Configuration > Advanced > Admin > Security. The verified values are: Password Lifetime = 90, Password Change = Forced (value 1), Maximum Login Failures to Lockout Account = 5, Lockout Time = 30, and Admin Session Lifetime = 1800. For custom values to be entered, the 'Use system value' checkbox next to each respective field must be unchecked.
